◎片　　名　Her Private London
◎年　　代　2011

◎语　　言　泰语

◎片　　长　39分钟

◎简　　介  

　　This film attempts to re-appropriate anonymity. Its personal testimonial-like narrative draws you into the cliche myth of a 'typical' Thai girl working abroad. Its images, however, questions the truth of what she is telling us, as well as those drawn up within the spectator's mind.
introduction: This film attempts to re-appropriate anonymity. Its personal testimonial-like narrative draws you into the cliche myth of a 'typical' Thai girl working abroad. Its images, however, questions the truth of what she is telling us, as well as those drawn up within the spectator's mind.
